title: Opinions & Debates
shortSummary: Express your views, agree, disagree, and argue a point in Spanish. From casual opinions to formal debates — develop the language skills to hold your own in any discussion.
whyItMatters: Expressing opinions is where real communication happens. Moving beyond factual statements to sharing what you think, persuading others, and engaging in discussions transforms you from a tourist into a participant.
coreConcepts: Expressing opinions: Creo que, Pienso que, En mi opinión
Agreeing: Estoy de acuerdo, Tienes razón, Exacto
Disagreeing politely: No estoy de acuerdo, Depende, No necesariamente
Giving reasons: porque, ya que, debido a
Connecting ideas: sin embargo, además, por otro lado
Debate vocabulary: argumento, punto de vista, conclusión
Hedging and nuance: quizás, tal vez, posiblemente
Cultural norms around disagreement in Spanish-speaking cultures
